scripts.tauri:build: npm run pkg:stage-deps && NO_STRIP=1 APPIMAGE_EXTRACT_AND_RUN=1 tauri build
scripts.pkg:stage-deps: rm -rf src-tauri/dist-deps && mkdir -p src-tauri/dist-deps && cp package.json package-lock.json src-tauri/dist-deps/ && npm install --omit=dev --ignore-scripts --no-audit --no-fund --prefix src-tauri/dist-deps && rm -f src-tauri/dist-deps/package.json src-tauri/dist-deps/package-lock.json
